sections.title: Purpose / agenda recap
sections.markdown: Goal today: status, MVP decisions, then actions. Agenda covered: Project status → MVP scope decisions → Next steps.

sections.title: Key discussion points
sections.markdown:
- Backend: messages API is in place; next is transcript schema to make segmentation deterministic.
- Frontend: local proxy route works; avoid relying on npx for bootstrapping.
- MVP scope: realtime textbox stream is primary; pasted transcript is fallback; JSON upload is a stretch but helps repeatability.

sections.title: Decisions
sections.markdown: - Adopt v1 schema with a schema_version field and RFC3339 timestamps.

sections.title: Action items
sections.markdown:
- Alex: draft segmentation rules.
- Priya: wire UI input to the schema.

bullets: Backend messages API is in place; transcript schema is next to make segmentation deterministic.

bullets: Realtime textbox stream is primary; pasted transcript is fallback; JSON upload is a stretch but helps repeatability.
Decision: adopt v1 schema with schema_version and RFC3339 timestamps.

bullets: Action items assigned to Alex (segmentation rules) and Priya (UI input wiring).
